title: K-Line frame spec — responsive + tailwindHint contract
description: Design SSOT contract introduced in K-068 to close the layout-spec gap that caused K-067 desktop-vertical regression. Pencil exports 1440px-only absolute coordinates; the responsive + tailwindHint fields are the hand-authored bridge to the responsive Tailwind classes the React component must render. Required (per validate-specs.mjs) on every object where layout=horizontal AND there are >=2 visual children.

responsive.description: Tailwind class fragments that map the Pencil 1440px layout to mobile + desktop breakpoints.

mobile.description: Tailwind classes that apply at the smallest breakpoint (no md: prefix). Example: 'grid-cols-1' or 'flex-col'.

desktop.description: Tailwind classes that apply at md: and up (must include the md: prefix). Example: 'md:grid-cols-3' or 'md:flex-row'.

tailwindHint.description: Full Tailwind class string the React component should render verbatim. Example: 'grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-[14px]'. Acts as the canonical engineer-readable form of the responsive fields.
